document.title: Checklist for the General Safety and Performance Requirements
document.documentType: General Safety and Performance Requirements checklist

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. checklist mapping MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements to applicable standards, test reports, risk management, clinical evaluation, software, usability, labeling, and PMS evidence.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as technical documentation evidence for MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements conformity assessment and audit preparation.
keyPoints: Prepared, reviewed, and approved on April 12, 2024.
Applies MDR GSPR sections for general requirements, design and construction, active devices, software, and information supplied with the device.
Cites risk management files A-TCF-5-103 Rev.3 and A-TCF-5-104 Rev.4 across multiple GSPR requirements.
References safety, EMC, wireless EMC, RED, DQE, software validation, biocompatibility, clinical evaluation, usability, label, and user manual evidence.
Many requirements are marked not applicable for sterilisation, implantable devices, medicinal substances, lay use, and Annex XVI devices.

reviewFlags.reason: Product model names are not present in the source text or metadata productSignal.
Source metadata authoritySignal says MFDS/domestic, but the source text primarily cites MDR, EU directives, and EU regulations.
Document revision rev.3 is taken from the sourcePath filename; the visible source text does not separately state the checklist revision.
Several OCR or source-text quality issues are present, including misspellings and awkward phrases such as 'Non sterilie device' and 'unambiguous indication of t the time limit'.
Potentially conflicting evidence: the device is described as a digital imaging solution for radiographic diagnosis, while radiation-related GSPR sections state 'This device is not emitted radiation.'
